mapper.select: SELECT RULE_ID AS ruleId, USER_ID AS userId, CHECKIN_TYPE AS checkinType, REMIND_TIME AS remindTime, ENABLED AS enabled, SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM CHECKIN_REMINDER_RULES WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY CHECKIN_TYPE, SORT_ORDER, REMIND_TIME
